name: Tokyu Corporation
summary: Tokyu Corporation engages in the lifestyle services and retail businesses in Japan and internationally. It operates through Transportation, Real Estate, Life Services, and Hotel and Resort segments. The company engages in railway; real estate sales and leasing; video and sporting leisure; cable television and smart home; bus; automotive transportation; hotel, station kiosk, land, and airport management; school and preschool nursery; and SC planning, development, and management businesses. It also manages buildings and structures; and sells gravel, sand, crushed stone, and nonmetallic ores, as well as develops residential land, urban, and real estate properties. In addition, the company offers mechanical, facilities, and patrol security services; advertising agency services; and maintenance and remodeling of railway carriages, buses, etc. Further, it operates department and retailing chain stores, shopping centers, credit cards, electricity retailing, and gas agencies; and golf courses. Additionally, the company manufactures, leases, sells, and laundry of various textile goods, etc. Tokyu Corporation was founded in 1918 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
